title: dortmanna longifolia
intro: Dortmanna longifolia, also known as the Greater Periwinkle, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its blue-violet flowers and evergreen foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna longifolia include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support cardiovascular health, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
